summary: Iteration 59 Testing - P0 Features Verified: (1) Dashboard operational KPI row with 6 clickable cards (Active Pipeline->sales, New Leads Today->dialog, Pending Activations->cs, Mentor Students->mentor, Enrolled YTD=994, Enrolled MTD), (2) Academics Revenue shows AED 113,828, (3) Mentor CRM banner shows AED with rounded values, (4) Enrolled leads sorted by enrolled_at desc verified via API, (5) Advanced search fallback code present but needs frontend state fix for debounce

integration_issues.issue: Search debounce uses setTimeout without clearing previous timeouts, causing stale closure reference to searchTerm. Fallback UI may not appear immediately due to race condition.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/dashboard/overall returns 'operational' key with all required fields
Backend: operational.enrolled_ytd = 994 (hardcoded as requested)
Backend: operational.enrolled_mtd = 59 (dynamic count)
Backend: operational.active_pipeline, new_leads_today, pending_activations, mentor_students all present
Backend: revenue.selected_period.mentors returns AED value (113828)
Backend: revenue_split includes 'Academics' (not 'Mentors')
Backend: GET /api/mentor/revenue-summary returns AED values with grand_redeposits, grand_withdrawals, grand_net, unique_students
Backend: GET /api/mentor/redeposits/summary returns AED values with grand_total
Backend: GET /api/leads?stage=enrolled returns leads sorted by enrolled_at desc
Backend: GET /api/leads?search=nonexistent returns 0 results (fallback trigger)
Frontend: Dashboard operational KPI row visible with 6 cards
Frontend: Active Pipeline card (0) - click navigates to /sales
Frontend: New Leads Today card (14) - click opens dialog with leads table
Frontend: Pending Activations card (0) - click navigates to /cs
Frontend: Mentor Students card (963) - click navigates to /mentor
Frontend: Enrolled YTD card shows 994
Frontend: Enrolled MTD card shows 59
Frontend: Academics Revenue card shows 'AED 113,828' with '30 deposits'
Frontend: Mentor CRM banner shows 'AED 113,828' for Monthly Redeposits
Frontend: Mentor CRM banner shows 'AED 0' for Withdrawals
Frontend: Mentor CRM banner shows 'AED 113,828' for Net Active
Frontend: Mentor CRM banner shows '23' for Students Pitched
Frontend: All banner values are rounded (no excessive decimals)

BirdsEyeDashboard.jsx: New Leads Dialog implemented at lines 402-445 with table showing today's leads
MentorCRMPage.jsx: Revenue banner at lines 440-477 uses Math.round() for AED values

SalesCRMPage.jsx: Advanced search fallback at lines 924-987 shows when leads.length === 0
Server.py: get_overall_dashboard at line 6204 returns operational section with all KPIs
Server.py: mentor_pipeline at line 6265 uses amount_aed with fallback to amount
Server.py: get_mentor_revenue_summary at line 12931 aggregates amount_aed for AED values
